pipelines.name: two-pass
pipelines.description: Strategy that decouples reasoning in Spanish from strict JSON extraction.

pipelines.name: grounded
pipelines.description: Evidence-based agent that mandates source quotes to authorize extraction.

pipelines.name: auditor
pipelines.description: Self-correction loop with an adversarial audit to strike hallucinations.

pipelines.name: baseline
pipelines.description: Reference implementation using OpenAI Structured Outputs.

pipelines.name: end-anchored
pipelines.description: Strategy that places a blank JSON template at the end of the prompt.

pipelines.name: champion
pipelines.description: High-accuracy modular pipeline with RAG, Two-Pass reasoning, and ReAct verification.

pipelines.name: slim-champion
pipelines.description: Streamlined high-accuracy pipeline with RAG and Two-Pass reasoning, optimized for SLMs.

pipelines.name: stable-champion
pipelines.description: Streamlined architecture using the optimal Two-Pass invariant configuration (Null-Rule only).

pipelines.name: synthetic-anchor
pipelines.description: Experimental pipeline that uses synthetic examples from ArchitectModule as few-shot anchors when RAG fails.

pipelines.name: audited-synthetic
pipelines.description: Double-gate pipeline (RAG 0.55 + Synthetic Audit 0.70) with structural validation.
